title: Pan-Seared Asparagus with White Fish
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring pan-seared white fish and asparagus, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: 1. Rinse the asparagus spears and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Season the fish fillet with salt and pepper on both sides.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the fish fillet to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on the first side, or until golden brown.
5. Flip the fish and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, or until cooked through.
6. Meanwhile, add the asparagus spears to the skillet and cook for 3-5 minutes, or until tender.
7. Serve the fish and asparagus hot, garnished with additional salt and pepper if desired.
